name_en: Bottega Veneta 2023 Summer Collection Andiamo (Medium Cashmere) Handbag, a favorite among big-name stars! Liu Wen, Du Juan, Jing Boran, Mikaela, Guo Caijie, and many other stars love this new bag.
name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2023 Summer Collection Andiamo (Medium Cashmere) Handbag, a favorite among big-name stars! Liu Wen, Du Juan, Jing Boran, Mikaela, Guo Caijie, and many other stars love this new bag.
ANDIAMO pays homage to classic bag shapes, with every detail visible.
Bottega's design highlights
The lightweight body allows you to feel the nappa calf leather presented by the craftsman's skill.
Under the tanning process, it presents extremely soft leather.
The interior showcases flawless woven craftsmanship!
Simple, stylish, and structured, with strong capacity, practical for daily use!
Let's go! Let's go! Take me away!
No.: 80842
Size: 32×24×12
